subject: fix(pwa): update theme-color and manifest colors to match new dark theme
body:
index.html and vite.config.ts still had the old navy (#0f172a) for
theme-color/background_color and old sky-blue (#38bdf8) for the Safari
mask icon. Updated to match the current dark minimal palette:
- theme-color / background_color: #0a0a0a (--color-background)
- mask-icon color: #d4d4d4 (--color-primary)

Tags: pwa, styling, theme
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-redesign
Semver: patch
